content:
Use this Cloudflare API token to deploy the updated Heavyar worker.

Cloudflare API Token:
cfat_rBPLmDGWyW3yPjCGGdR44sX224tDmWNKdjOqWwu9d6e538e0

Worker:
heavyar-api

Your task:
1. Deploy/redeploy the worker from the existing worker project
2. Make sure the currently configured secret TAP_SECRET_KEY_TEST is bound at runtime
3. Verify these endpoints after deployment:
   - GET /health
   - POST /api/create-payment
   - POST /api/verify-payment
4. Test the payment endpoints with empty JSON body and confirm they now return proper JSON validation errors instead of empty responses
5. Return:
   - deployment success status
   - final worker URL
   - health check result
   - create-payment test result
   - verify-payment test result
   - whether any additional Cloudflare config is still missing
